authors: Luiz Peres-Neto Santiago Giraldo Luque Juan Pablo Soriano Gatica
raw_title: Accountability Sabotage and Journalism: Digital Authoritarian Practices and Chilling Effect in Latin America
title_en: Accountability Sabotage and Journalism: Digital Authoritarian Practices and Chilling Effect in Latin America
title_zh: 问责破坏与新闻业：拉丁美洲的数字威权实践与寒蝉效应
plain_summary_zh: 这篇研究探讨了在拉丁美洲，数字威权主义如何通过破坏问责机制来影响新闻业，导致记者自我审查的寒蝉效应。
plain_summary_en: This research examines how digital authoritarianism in Latin America undermines accountability mechanisms in journalism, leading to a chilling effect where journalists self-censor.
research_direction_zh: 研究数字威权主义对新闻业问责机制的影响，特别是在拉丁美洲的政治和媒体环境中。
research_direction_en: Investigating the impact of digital authoritarianism on accountability mechanisms in journalism, particularly within the political and media contexts of Latin America.
